test(runtime): add comprehensive wire protocol test coverage (#344)

Expand the wire.rs test module from 6 tests to 55, covering all major
behaviours with roundtrip, boundary, and negative/error-path tests.

New coverage areas:
- Varint: zero, 127/128 boundary, u64::MAX, empty buffer, truncated
  multibyte, non-canonical 10th byte
- Zigzag: 0, ±1, i64::MIN/MAX, sign→parity mapping invariant
- Fixed32/64: encode+decode roundtrip, truncated buffer rejection
- HBF header: zero/max payload, null data, too-short buffer, wrong
  magic, wrong version, unknown flags, flag stripping, write_hbf_header
- Decode bytes: truncated payload
- Decode string: roundtrip, empty, truncated, empty buffer
- Decode tag: roundtrip, empty buffer
- Skip field: all four wire types, truncated fixed32/64, unknown type
- buf_has_remaining, buf_reset
- Envelope: empty payload, max msg_type boundary, negative msg_type,
  too-large msg_type, truncated mid-field, unknown wire type

Sabotage-validated three error-path tests to confirm they detect
regressions when the corresponding production checks are removed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(analyzers): CVJ-003 now replaces declaration type with bool

The code fix for CVJ-003 replaced .Validate(...) with .EvaluateSchema()
but left explicit variable declaration types (e.g. ValidationContext)
unchanged, producing code that would not compile.

Both fix paths (simple and collector-based) now detect
LocalDeclarationStatementSyntax with an explicit type and replace it
with bool. Added 3 new tests covering explicit type replacement,
collector + type replacement, and var-type preservation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Eliminate auto-save restore race with synchronous localStorage read

All previous restore approaches had race conditions between async
localStorage read, component rendering, and Monaco editor initialization.

Fix: use IJSInProcessRuntime.Invoke<T> (available in Blazor WASM) to
read localStorage synchronously in OnInitialized(), before the component
ever renders. The state is fully resolved before editors are created,
so no SetValue push is needed — editors get the correct content on
their initial render via the model (schemaFiles, GetInitialUserCode).

Removed: hasRestoredState flag, OnInitializedAsync override, all
OnDidInit/OnAfterRenderAsync restore logic.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix auto-save restore: use OnDidInit callbacks instead of OnAfterRenderAsync

The Blazor @ref is assigned during render, but the Monaco JS editor
is created asynchronously after that. Checking 'schemaEditor is not null'
in OnAfterRenderAsync can run before Monaco is ready (editors.length: 0).

Move the restore push into OnSchemaEditorInit and OnUserCodeEditorInit
callbacks, which fire when Monaco has actually created the editor instance.
This guarantees SetValue is safe to call.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix auto-save restore: push content in OnAfterRenderAsync after editors exist

OnInitializedAsync runs before the component has rendered, so the Monaco
editor refs don't exist yet. Move the restored content push to
OnAfterRenderAsync (not gated on firstRender), checking hasRestoredState
and schemaEditor is not null. This ensures editors are ready before we
call SetValue on them.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Corvus.Text.Json
repository.description: A version of System.Text.Json to support schema-based code generation.

commit.message:
Fix auto-save restore: push content into editors from OnInitializedAsync

The previous fix put the editor sync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender),
but firstRender fires BEFORE RestoreAutoSavedState completes (the first
await yields to the renderer). By the time the restore sets
hasRestoredState=true, OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender=true) has already
run and won't fire again.

Fix: move the editor push into OnInitializedAsync, right after
RestoreAutoSavedState returns. At that point the editors exist (the
component rendered during the await) so SetValue works. Also guard
OnSchemaEditorInit to skip the model-overwrite when a restore is pending.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Convert all NPC default dialogues to 5-item lists; rewrite 카르니스/루바토/라파엘

- Convert every single-string 'default' value to a Python list of 5 varied responses
- Applies to: 다몬, 오멜룸, 몰, 아라벨라, 제블로어, 브룩샤, 실렌, 알피라, 엘레라신, 게일의 환영, 카엘릭
- Convert all tuple-concatenated multi-line strings (그림자 등불, 파편 수리, etc.) to 5-item lists
- Full rewrite: 카르니스 — cold, contemptuous drider tone (반말); 루바토 — cheerful bard (반말)
- 라파엘 — expand all 5 keywords to 5-item lists in theatrical cambion voice
- Remove 루바토's '타브' keyword entirely per spec
- Keep all 마을/날씨/소문 lists (already 5+) and all affinity tier entries unchanged

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix boot progress to track full download completion, not just headers

fetch() resolves when response headers arrive, but the body may still
be streaming. Now reads the full arrayBuffer before incrementing the
progress counter, then wraps it in a new Response for Blazor to consume.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix duplicate 'Compiling' console line and auto-save restore mismatch

Two fixes:
1. RunAsync wrote 'Compiling...' twice to console - removed the duplicate.
2. Auto-save restore ran after first render, so Monaco editors had stale
   content from OnInitialized while the model (schemaFiles, activeSampleId)
   was updated by the async restore. Added hasRestoredState flag and
   OnAfterRenderAsync logic to push restored content into the editors
   after they are ready, wrapped in isLoadingContent guard to prevent
   DetachFromSample.

commit.message:
Fix boot progress: only intercept assembly/dotnetwasm, return null for dotnetjs

Blazor requires dotnetjs resources to return a URI string or null,
not a Promise<Response>. Now only intercepts 'assembly' and 'dotnetwasm'
resource types for progress tracking; all other types fall through to
default Blazor loading.

commit.message:
Implement multiplayer visibility and attacking for new players

- Add Colyseus client (colyseus.js) for real-time server connection
- Create NetworkService to manage connection, state sync, and input sending
- Create RemoteTank entity to render other players with health bars and names
- Create ServerBullet entity to render bullets from server state
- Update GameScene to:
  - Connect to Colyseus server on game start
  - Handle player join/leave events immediately
  - Sync remote player positions, rotations, health
  - Render all bullets from server state
  - Send player inputs to server each frame
  - Display kill/respawn notifications
- Add vitest to server devDependencies (was missing)
- Fix type imports for verbatimModuleSyntax

New players are now immediately visible to all connected players and can be
attacked without any protection period or visibility delay.

Closes #2

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
security: fix CodeQL suppression comment rule IDs

Previous comments used incorrect IDs (js/network-data-written-to-file,
js/file-data-to-outbound-request) which CodeQL did not recognise.
Correct IDs are:
  js/http-to-file-access      — Network data written to file
  js/file-access-to-http      — File data in outbound network request

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix sample dropdown: guard against DetachFromSample during programmatic loads, format XML docs in tooltips

Two fixes:
1. Sample selection immediately reset to 'Custom project' because setting
   editor content fired OnSchemaContentChanged -> DetachFromSample. Added
   isLoadingContent guard flag set during sample loads, new project, open
   project, and auto-save restore.
2. 'New' button showed 'Data Object' because activeSampleId was set to a
   non-existent option value. Now uses null consistently for non-sample
   states, matching the '-- Custom project --' placeholder.
3. Signature help tooltips showed raw XML documentation. Added XML doc
   parser that extracts summary, returns, remarks, and per-parameter docs
   into clean Markdown text. JS side passes docs as MarkdownString for
   proper rendering.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
security: fix TOCTOU race conditions and suppress intentional data-flow alerts

Race conditions (js/file-system-race-condition):
- install.service: replace fs.access() + conditional writeFile() with atomic
  writeFile({ flag: 'wx' }) + catch EEXIST for NeoForge and Fabric version
  manifest writes — eliminates the check-then-use window
- modpack-api.service: replace fs.stat() + fs.readFile() with a single
  FileHandle (open → stat → readFile on the same handle) so the file cannot
  be deleted between the existence check and the read

False positives (js/network-data-written-to-file, js/file-data-to-outbound-request):
- install.service: suppress writeFile alerts for pack manifest/versionManifest
  writes — a modpack launcher intentionally persists fetched pack data
- modpack-api.service: suppress writeFile alert for logo image cache write
- launch.service: suppress fetch body alert for user-triggered log upload
  to paste.myftb.de

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Task.Yield() before heavy sync work to improve UI responsiveness

In single-threaded Blazor WASM, synchronous Roslyn compilation and code
generation block the UI thread entirely. Add Task.Yield() calls before
heavy work in GenerateAsync, RunAsync, live diagnostics, and
CompilationService.CompileAsync so the browser can render status updates
(spinner, progress text) before the thread is blocked.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: Cattle Health Monitoring System

- C_RESTAPI: FastAPI backend with MongoDB Atlas
  - JWT + API key authentication
  - Cattle CRUD, sensor data ingestion (bulk)
  - Health evaluation with threshold-based alerts
  - Email notifications with 48h health graphs
  - Role-based access (super_admin/admin/user)

- C_FRONTEND: Streamlit dashboard
  - MongoDB-inspired dark/light theme (default: light)
  - Role-based dashboards (Super Admin/Admin/User)
  - Multi-language support (English/Tamil/Hindi)
  - Real-time cattle health graphs (Plotly)
  - Cattle management, user management, alerts
  - Integrated logo and professional UI

- .gitignore configured (venv, .env, __pycache__, IDE files)
- .env.example files for both frontend and backend

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: exclude build artifacts from CodeQL scan, remove unneeded build step

CodeQL analyses TypeScript source directly and does not need a compiled
build. Running the build before analysis caused out/ and dist/ to be
included in the scan, producing false positives from bundled/minified
output. Remove the build step and add paths-ignore for out/, dist/, and
node_modules/ to keep the scan scoped to src/.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

security: fix CodeQL warnings across install, java, API, and router services

- install.service: add isPathWithinDir() guard to reject manifest task.to
  paths that escape the instance directory via ../ traversal (js/path-injection)
- modpack-api.service: escape prop before inserting into new RegExp() to
  prevent regex injection (js/regex-injection)
- java.service: replace dynamic new RegExp() with a static Record<17|21,RegExp>
  lookup — required is always a number but CodeQL flags it (js/regex-injection)
- router.ts: add explicit https:/http: protocol check before shell.openExternal
  to silence open-redirect alert (js/open-url-redirection)
- launch.service: strip newlines from packName before writing desktop entry
  fields as a defense-in-depth measure
- tests: add install-path-guard.test.ts (7 cases for isPathWithinDir) and
  extend java-version.test.ts with two cross-version rejection cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: block all major version bumps in Dependabot

A vite 7→8 PR broke the build because electron-vite doesn't support
Vite 8 yet. The previous config only blocked majors for electron-vite
and @vitejs/plugin-react but not vite itself.

Replace the per-package ignore list with a global rule that blocks all
major bumps. Major upgrades always require manual migration work anyway
and should not be opened automatically.

ci: opt into Node.js 24 for GitHub Actions runners

actions/checkout@v4 and actions/setup-node@v4 still run on Node.js 20
which is deprecated. Setting FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true
opts in now — this becomes the enforced default on June 2nd 2026.
Applied to build.yml, release.yml, and codeql.yml.

commit.message:
fix: debug_logger None クラッシュ修正 & Syoboi優先処理順序

[LOG: START] Step 1: バグ修正
- debug_logger が None のとき .debug() を直接呼んでいたクラッシュを
  'if debug_logger:' ガードで修正（syoboi_data_fetched ログ出力箇所）

[LOG: START] Step 2: Grok枠の優先割当
- Step 3 のループ前に prioritized_animes を構築:
  syoboi_hit_animes（Syoboiヒット作品）を先頭に、
  non_syoboi_animes（配信限定・TID未設定）を後尾に配置。
- enumerate(active_animes) → enumerate(prioritized_animes) に変更。
- ループ内部のロジックは無変更。並び順のみ変更で目的達成。

[THOUGHT: 配信限定作品などに Grok 枠を先食いされないよう、
番組表掲載作品（あらすじ未取得の可能性が高い）を優先処理する]

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(daily): syoboi_tid設定済み作品はGrok呼出をスキップ

- Syoboi番組表にヒットしなかった作品の処理を二分岐に変更:
  - syoboi_tid が設定されている場合: TV放送作品で今週は放送前/終了/休止と判断し
    Grokを呼び出さず logging.info でスキップ理由を明記
  - syoboi_tid が未設定の場合: 配信限定またはTID未特定の作品として
    従来通り1日5回の枠内でGrokへ問い合わせ
- ログメッセージで判断理由（syoboi_tid値・スキップ理由）が明確に分かるよう調整

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Monaco race condition: delay Blazor start until Monaco loaded

BlazorMonaco silently fails (console error, no retry) if the monaco
global isn't available when it tries to create editors. On hard refresh,
the AMD require for vs/editor/editor.main may not complete before
Blazor renders the StandaloneCodeEditor components.

Fix: use autostart=false on blazor.webassembly.js and gate Blazor.start()
on a monacoReady promise that resolves when the AMD require completes.
The require() call is issued before jsInterop.js loads (which clobbers
the AMD require with a plain config object).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(season_adder): syoboi詳細取得によるshort_name/official_url優先ロジック追加

- _normalize_for_short_name(): 英語タイトルをCamelCase化するヘルパーを追加
- fetch_syoboi_details(): しょぼいカレンダー個別TID詳細取得関数を追加
  - XMLのCommentフィールドをparseしてx_handle / official_urlを抽出
  - API呼び出し後にtime.sleep(0.5)でサーバー負荷軽減
  - _SYOBOI_DETAIL_URL 定数を追加
- メインループの処理順を最適化:
  1. jikan抽出をsyoboi_tid取得の前に移動（title_english参照のため）
  2. syoboi_tidが存在する場合のみfetch_syoboi_detailsを呼び出す
- short_name決定ロジック（3段階優先）:
  1. syoboi_details["x_handle"] → アンダースコア保持・小文字化
  2. jikan["title_english"] → CamelCase正規化
  3. str(mal_id) → フォールバック
- anime_id生成をgenerate_anime_id()からf-string直接構築に変更
  （アンダースコア保持・ハッシュフォールバック維持）
- official_url決定: syoboi_details優先 → Jikan URLへフォールバック

Add comprehensive tests for Travel Language Coach

Create 8 test files with 112 tests covering:
- conftest.py: shared fixtures for profiles, scenarios, sessions, scores
- test_models.py: all data models, enums, serialization, ScoreBreakdown
- test_scoring.py: ScoringEngine weighted scores, ratings, trends, difficulty
- test_memory_agent.py: profile CRUD, mistakes, phrase mastery, history
- test_scenario_agent.py: scenario selection, filtering, difficulty adjustment
- test_phrase_retrieval.py: phrase packs, polite alternatives, culture notes
- test_data_loader.py: JSON data loading for France and Italy
- test_session_manager.py: session lifecycle, transcript, evaluation recap

commit.message:
Add scoring engine, session manager, and learner loop

Implement the scoring system and session management for the Travel
Language Coach project:

- ScoringEngine: weighted score computation, rating labels, trend
  analysis, difficulty recommendations, and score summaries
- SessionManager: full session lifecycle management coordinating
  memory, scenario, phrase retrieval, tutor, and evaluator agents
- LearnerLoop: core practice loop tying together session management,
  tutor interactions, and progress tracking
- Updated __init__.py files to export new classes

  market categories across beginner to upper-intermediate difficulty

commit.message:
Implement all 6 Travel Language Coach agents with base class

- BaseAgent: abstract base with agent_name/role properties, process(), get_system_prompt(), and _call_llm() placeholder
- OrchestratorAgent: session lifecycle, learner context loading, agent routing
- TutorAgent: in-character roleplay, repair-before-reveal, help threshold logic
- EvaluatorAgent: session scoring with heuristics, mistake extraction, recap generation
- MemoryAgent: in-memory stores for profiles, mistakes, phrase mastery with recurrence tracking
- ScenarioAgent: scenario selection by weakness/difficulty/history with difficulty adjustment
- PhraseRetrievalAgent: phrase pack management, polite alternatives, culture notes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
